hero.title: Learn English with <mark>a tutor who fits you</mark>
hero.subtitle: Thousands of live lessons at a price for every budget. Pick your tutor, pick your time, and start speaking from the very first lesson.
hero.trustNote: No risk — swap a trial lesson you didn't love for free

languageGrid.title: Which language do you want to learn?
languageGrid.subtitle: Start with English — more languages are on the way.

howItWorks.title: Get started in three simple steps
howItWorks.step1Text: Filter by price, availability and specialty. Browse profiles and intro videos.
howItWorks.step2Text: Talk to your tutor in a live video lesson. No software to install.
howItWorks.step3Text: Keep your schedule, do the homework and see real results.

guarantee.title: A tutor match, guaranteed
guarantee.text: If your first lesson isn't the right fit, get a free trial with another tutor. No risk at all.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor, set your own rate
becomeTutor.text: Teach whenever and wherever you want. You're in control of your earnings — you set the price.
